name: reprise
description: gittiğin her konser, tekrar tekrar yaşanan bir nakarat.

scripts.prebuild: cp index.html data-service.js app.js style.css www/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run prebuild && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run prebuild && npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run prebuild && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
